name:
I'm on the edge of a hot rocky cliff
outside the Volcano
description:
I'm on the edge of a hot rocky cliff
outside the Volcano
hints: Hot rocky cliff outside the volcano. There's a crevice here.
LOOK DOWN reveals a cave at sea level far below. DO NOT JUMP!
GO CREV to enter the crevice. Jumping from here is fatal.
GO CREV leads deeper. JUMP=death. LOOK DOWN sees the beach cave (room 16).
notes: Hot cliff outside volcano. GO CREV enters crevice. JUMP is fatal! Cave visible below at sea level.
